title: 8 distinct items:
description: A small inventory artifact recording ordinary objects, food, books, doodles, coffee, poems, and film as a modest field of daily continuity.

motifMap.meaning: The list gathers small anchors of attention without forcing them into a larger argument.
Food and drink hold the domestic warmth of ordinary presence.
The artifact frames simple observation as a small creative record rather than a full confession.

excerpt: Books. Small Books. English section in Guatemala. Chocolate cake. Journal Doodles. Mocha latte.

associatedMedia.description: Screenshot of the published Substack post page, if available in the local screenshot archive. Screenshot capture remains optional provenance support and was not required for validation in this run.
associatedMedia.altText: A short Wanderer's Burn Substack post titled '8 distinct items:' by Unnamed, published May 8, 2026, listing books, chocolate cake, journal doodles, a mocha latte, poems of images, and Uncut Gems.

editHistory.notes: Batch v2.6.5 metadata run. Classified as The Candle's Glow with Early / Domestic variant because the post records a small ordinary inventory of daily objects, tastes, and creative anchors.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-05-08.8-distinct-items.phase-the-candles-glow.variant-early-domestic.metadata.v2.6.5.json. Variant assignment follows v2.6.5 phase-variant compatibility.
